cd backend/logs/audit/task-orchestrator && for d in task-*; do
  f=$(ls "$d"/*.json 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  if [ -n "$f" ]; then
    python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('$f'))
for b in d:
  done = b.get('completed') or b.get('done')
  st = b.get('status','?')
  print(f\"$d | b{b.get('index')} | {st} | {b.get('title','')[:60]}\")
" 2>/dev/null
  fi
done | head -80
done

" 2>/dev/null
  fi
done | head -80
done"}
